current_seeded_from.note: All available unique 56/64 candidates were extracted from smart-22-shard-* artifacts; artifacts contain many repeated top-result occurrences.
This completed run preserved one best JSON per shard; 20 source records produced 5 unique candidate geometries.
This repo seed is a duplicate of one 57/64 geometry already seen in repair-search-5, but is recorded as an additional source.

deduplication.verified: Each unique record was rechecked by exact integer collinearity; recorded covered_count and links match vertices2.

important_note: Runs folders remain the historical experiment log. This candidates directory is the reusable unified seed bank.

not_included.reason: Recorded best was 54/64, below the current 56/64 threshold.

purpose: Unified bank of strong 22-link candidates for the 4x4x4 minimum-link covering trail search.
